rulings.Case Title: EST. OF DER HONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: UPDATED 6/17/26 AT 3:37 pm Hearing. Appearance required. (1) Petitioner keeps referring to the decedent's will as a "joint will" even though it was independently signed as a widow. The Court may further inquire how reporting all assets in the predeceased spouse's estate was appropriate. (2) Petition alleges no assets in this estate because all assessts were reported in the predeceased spouse's probate matter (#216028). However, there is a court record in PES-20-303882 (Estate of Raymond, petition filed on 7/12/2021 by Kan and So-Epprecht presented that this estate owned 25 % in Grant and 30% in Spofford. (2) The Court to determine how best to proceed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF ANTHONY D. YUEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #7, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) $1,273.00 in receipts are unable to be identified. 2) Petitioners request authority to spend up to $120K to purchase new vehicle. No estimates to fix the defective door or to purchase the new vehicle have been provided. 3) Amounts greatly exceeding the FDIC limits have been deposited into Chase Bank and Citibank. 4) Court to determine whether services of a court appointed counsel are still needed. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PAUL D. BRIARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/26/26. (No earlier availability.) Aside from obtaining an order confirming who the heirs are, other issues posted in the tentative ruling for the hearing on 11/10/25 have not yet been addressed: (1) No proof of service of notice of the amendment has been filed. The ONLY PROPER FORM OF NOTICE is the mandatory Judicial Council form Notice of Hearing, on the reverse side of which is the proof of service that should be completed. (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) Notice is defective if mailed before the filing of the pleading requiring notice. [LRSF 14.14 A.] (4) The address for Lori Barrows Hoag shown in paragraph 2 of the amendment is not the address to which notice was mailed to her on 8/14/25 (and also not the address shown on the inappropriate proof of service attached to the amendment filed on10/17/25). (5) Please file proof of the sale of the firearms by the dealers (receipt of the sale proceeds by the estate). (6) The proposed distribution is the same as in the petition - not the one reflecting the corrected statutory compensation. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 8/12/26. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EILEEN P GUERRA
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/26/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proof of service of notice of this hearing has been filed. (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) The report of status does not provide all the disclosures required by LRSF 14.35 J. (4) A final I&A has not yet been filed, although Executor was appointed on 12/18/24. Please provide a revised proposed order that comports with Probate Code Section 1260(b) and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 8/12/26. It is assumed, however, that, as alleged by the executor, his petition for final distribution will have been filed before this continuance date, as he requested just two months more to administer the estate when he verified this petition on 3/6/26. If the petition for final distribution is filed before 8/26/26, this report/petition will be taken off calendar. If the petition for final distribution is not filed before the continuance date, an appearance will likely be required on 8/26/26. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE FRIENDS OF THE FAIRDUSTMARTIN'S IRREVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Probate Petition 17200, 850, Breach 16420 By Trust Directors, 850, Wic 15610.07 Bpc 22256-7, Gov 11350, Civ223-4 For Relief By Constructive Trust, Recovery Of Personal Property, Trustee Compensation, Damages Etc
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues to be addressed at hearing: 1) DE-115 is the mandatory form for this type of proceeding (Probate Code Section 859). 2) A notice or other paper shall not be delivered by electronic means unless the person to receive notice has expressly consented on the appropriate Judicial Council form to receive electronic delivery in the proceeding before the court and has provided an electronic service address for that express purpose (Probate Code Section 1215(c)(1)). 3) The trust instrument has not been provided to the court. 4) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court (LRSF 14.7.A.4). Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Matter will be called to admit will. No appearance is required. Status hearing on close of estate will be set for 12/27/27. No appearance will be necessary on that date if either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Probate Code 12200 et seq is filed at least two weeks prior.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IN RE THE ROBERT J. MCCABE AND PAULINE J.MCCABE REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mccabe Against Trustee Kelli Mccabe For 1. Accounting Probate Code 16061, 16061 & 17200
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/26/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) The name and last known address of all vested or contingent beneficiaries must be stated in a petition involving a trust. [CRC 7.902.] An interested party's attorney's address is not sufficient. (4) A courtesy copy of the petition has not been provided to (or received by) the assigned examiner, as required by LRSF 14.7 B., so it was only cursorily reviewed online; however, the title of the petition appears to be incomplete. Is all relief sought in the prayer included in the title of the petition? [CRC 7.102.] Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 8/12/26. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RUBEN GARCIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing to admit the will. No appearance required. DISCLOSURE: The assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court. Status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for 12/20/2027.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing to admit the will. No appearance required. Status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for 12/20/2027.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TERESA DE LAURETIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/12/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The will does not appear to have been FILED. No will file has been provided to the assigned examiner. (2) Who is the trustee of the devisee trust? If Evan Loeffler is the trustee, all beneficiaries of the trust must be listed in item 8 of the petition and must receive notice. (3) "Proposed personal representative" is not a relationship to the decedent. One is either kin or a stranger. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 7/29/26. (A supplement, prepared on pleading paper and signed and verified by the petitioner should suffice. Hopefully, the original will will also be filed well before the continued hearing.) Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (It is unclear why the decedent's brother was included in item 8 of the petition. Unless he is a beneficiary under the trust, he is not entitled to notice; the sole heir is the decedent's son.)
